message:
Improve SSH command timeout cleanup documentation

Timeout handling clarity (ssh.rs):
- Add detailed comments explaining remote process termination on timeout
- Document that openssh Session::close() sends SIGTERM to control master
- Explain why cleanup is important to prevent orphaned remote processes
- Note that reader tasks are detached but will terminate when channel closes
- Update log messages to indicate cleanup is occurring
- Document the cleanup sequence for both regular and streaming commands

No behavioral changes - this is documentation improvement for maintainability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
